entity.label: Kibzaim
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Two heaps, a city of Ephraim, assigned to the Kohathite Levites, and appointed as a city of refuge (Josh. 21: 22). It is also called Jokmeam (1 Chr. 6:68).

nodes.label: Kibzaim
nodes.description: Two heaps, a city of Ephraim, assigned to the Kohathite Levites, and appointed as a city of refuge (Josh. 21: 22). It is also called Jokmeam (1 Chr. 6:68).

verses.text: And Kibzaim with her suburbs, and Bethhoron with her suburbs; four cities.
